name: Microwave Playdough
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart glass dish, combine the dry ingredients.
2. Gradually add water and oil until well mixed.
3. Microwave on high for 3-4 minutes, stirring every minute until thick and lumpy.
4. Cool on a flat plate.
5. Knead on a floured surface until smooth.
6. Store in a covered container in the refrigerator for 1-2 weeks.
